overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a futuristic police AV flying past the Black Sapphire building in Night City. The camera slowly pans along the building facade to reveal a dystopian urban plaza with neon-lit structures including a geodesic dome and an obelisk.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view alongside Black Sapphire tower with elevated highways

events.description: flying police AV with active searchlights ascends and begins exiting the upper frame

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left along the curved facade of the tower, maintaining focus on the passing aircraft

notable_agents.action: flying police AV with bright searchlights moving upward and away from the building

entered.detail: tall curved skyscraper with gold vertical trim and 'BLACK SAPPHIRE' signage
armored flying vehicle with twin searchlights illuminating the building facade
elevated roadway structure with bright pink neon underlighting
large spherical building visible in the hazy distance
barrel with orange flames on the street level below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view alongside the Black Sapphire building as a police AV flies past with searchlights scanning the facade. The camera slowly pans left, revealing neon-lit elevated highways and the dystopian cityscape stretching into the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city plaza with obelisk and neon geodesic dome

events.description: police AV completely exits frame, revealing the open plaza and obelisk below
large cyan neon geodesic dome becomes fully visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward aerial pan to reveal the plaza and architectural landmarks

entered.detail: large pyramid-shaped geodesic structure with bright cyan neon edge lighting
tall dark stone obelisk monument in the center of the plaza
open pedestrian plaza with circular walkways and scattered palm trees

segments.scene_description: With the police AV gone, the camera continues panning left to reveal a grand city plaza featuring a towering obelisk and a striking neon-lit geodesic dome. The Black Sapphire building gradually recedes to the right edge as the view opens up to show the bustling streets and futuristic architecture of the district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan that shifts from a close-up of a corporate skyscraper to a wide, sweeping view of a dystopian urban plaza. It begins alongside the Black Sapphire building as a police AV flies past, its searchlights scanning the facade while the camera slowly pivots left to reveal neon-lit elevated highways stretching into a hazy distance. As the police vehicle departs, the camera continues its smooth leftward trajectory, causing the Black Sapphire building to gradually recede toward the right edge of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a grand city plaza dominated by a towering obelisk and a striking neon-lit geodesic dome. Finally, the view expands fully to encompass the bustling streets and futuristic architecture of the surrounding district.
